text:
The Round Turtle is an anime-only animal in the 1999 anime adaptation. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 2 (1999) 

Appearance

The Round Turtle has a sphere-shaped shell, an elongated neck, drowsy eyes, and a beak. 

Behavior

When a Round Turtle starts rolling it tends to not stop. 

Plot

Hunter Exam arc

A tour guide to the animal show held on Whale Island introduces the Round Turtle and details that once it starts rolling it doesn't stop and that its name is "Kameira-chan". Later, Gon releases all of the caged animals at the animal show. 

References

 

fr:Kameira-chan
